name: Rams @Elec — Load-Shedding Client Alert
description: Triggered when new load-shedding events are detected. Sends personalised WhatsApp alerts to affected customers, prioritising cold room owners.

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, phone, whatsapp, area_zone FROM customers WHERE area_zone = '{{ $json.area_zone }}' AND alert_subscribed = true

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name, c.phone, c.whatsapp, c.area_zone, c.address FROM customers c JOIN equipment e ON c.id = e.customer_id WHERE c.area_zone = '{{ $json.area_zone }}' AND e.type = 'cold_room' AND c.alert_subscribed = true

parameters.message:
⚠️ LOAD SHEDDING ALERT — Rams @Elec

Stage {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.stage }} load shedding begins at {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.start_time }} in {{ $json.area_zone }}.

🔴 COLD ROOM WARNING: Your cold room at {{ $json.address }} may be affected. Ensure backup power is ready. Perishable goods at risk!

Need backup support? Call: +27 71 101 8493
Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

⚡ Load Shedding Alert — Rams @Elec

Stage {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.stage }}: {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.start_time }} – {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.end_time }} in {{ $json.area_zone }}.

Protect your equipment — surge protection and backup power available.
Get a free quote: https://ramsatelec.com/inquire
Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO notification_log (customer_id, channel, message_type, content, status, sent_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', 'whatsapp', 'loadshedding_alert', 'Load shedding Stage {{ $('Webhook — New Load-Shedding Event').item.json.stage }} alert for {{ $json.area_zone }}', 'sent', NOW())
